name: recovery-authority
description: Give Codex consequence awareness and require proven recovery before destructive operations.

interface.longDescription: Maps consequences, recovery coverage, uncertainty, and authority; restore-tests supported destructive effects before releasing one human-approved capability.
defaultPrompt: Safely delete these files with a recovery proof.
Orient to the consequences of this cleanup command before running it.
Prove this PostgreSQL deletion can be recovered before running it.
Show operations that are waiting for my approval.
Show the recovery status for this operation.
